params.sig: WebAuthn assertion blob authorizing this approval

cancelModuleInstall().details: Owner OR any single guardian may veto. The timelock exists precisely to let ANY other      stakeholder stop an install pushed through by a compromised owner+1-guardian pair, so a      single honest party must be able to cancel. This deliberately mirrors cancelWeightChange      (owner-or-any-guardian) rather than the 2-of-3 cancelRecovery: recovery's higher cancel bar      stops a lone compromised guardian from blocking legitimate recovery, but here easy      cancellation IS the defense, so the looser rule is the safer one.

cancelRecovery().details: Owner cannot cancel: a stolen owner key could otherwise block legitimate recovery.

params.sig: WebAuthn assertion blob authorizing this cancel vote

executeModuleInstall(bytes).details: Permissionless (like executeRecovery) — authorization was captured at propose time and the      timelock window has elapsed. The caller must reproduce the exact module init data that was      proposed (its keccak256 must match the stored hash) so onInstall receives the authorized config.

params.moduleInitData: The module init data committed at propose time.

params.initData: When sigsRequired > 0: abi.encode(uint8[] signerIdxs, bytes[] sigs, bytes moduleInitData).   When sigsRequired == 0: raw module init data.   Op: "INSTALL_MODULE", opData: abi.encode(moduleTypeId, module, keccak256(moduleInitData), nonce).

params.signerIdxs: Guardian slot indices corresponding to each signature
params.sigs: Signatures: 65-byte (r||s||v) eth-signed sig for ECDSA; for P-256 the WebAuthn                   assertion blob abi.encode(authenticatorData, clientDataJSONPrefix, clientDataJSONSuffix, r, s)

returns.executeAfter: Fixed timestamp from which the proposal may be executed (immutable once set).
returns.initDataHash: keccak256 of the committed module init data.

proposeModuleInstall(uint256,address,byt.details: Only valid when the timelock is enabled. Requires the SAME authorization as a normal      install at the configured threshold (owner + N guardian sigs); the guardian signature is      consumed via the module-management nonce so it cannot be replayed. After the timelock      elapses anyone may call executeModuleInstall; meanwhile owner or any guardian may cancel.

params.initData: When sigsRequired > 0: abi.encode(signerIdxs, sigs, moduleInitData).        When sigsRequired == 0: raw module init data.        Op: "INSTALL_MODULE", opData: abi.encode(moduleTypeId, module, keccak256(moduleInitData), nonce).

params.sig: WebAuthn assertion blob authorizing this proposal

params.signerIdxs: Guardian slot indices corresponding to each signature
params.sigs: Signatures: 65-byte (r||s||v) eth-signed sig for ECDSA guardians; for P-256                   guardians the WebAuthn assertion blob                   abi.encode(authenticatorData, clientDataJSONPrefix, clientDataJSONSuffix, r, s)

setModuleInstallTimelock(uint256,bytes).details: Strengthening (increasing, or first-time set) is a direct owner action. Weakening      (reducing or disabling → 0) requires the SAME elevated owner+2-guardian consensus as the      immediate-install bypass, so a compromised owner+1-guardian pair cannot silently switch      the protection off and then install instantly. On accounts with fewer than 2 guardians the      weakening bar degrades to all available guardians (mirrors uninstallModule's min(count,2)),      so the timelock can never become permanently un-removable.

params.guardianSigs: abi.encode(uint8[] signerIdxs, bytes[] sigs) over        ("SET_MODULE_TIMELOCK", abi.encode(newTimelock, moduleManagementNonce)).        Ignored (may be empty) when strengthening.
params.newTimelock: New timelock in seconds (0 disables). Capped at MAX_MODULE_INSTALL_TIMELOCK        (30 days); larger values revert ModuleInstallTimelockTooLong.

tierLimitNonce().details: Reached via account.fallback() → delegatecall(agentExtension).      Reads _tierLimitNonce from the ACCOUNT's storage (slot 16), not the extension's.

uninstallModule(uint256,address,bytes).details: Requires min(guardianCount, 2) guardian sigs.      deInitData: abi.encode(uint8[] signerIdxs, bytes[] sigs).      Op: "UNINSTALL_MODULE", opData: abi.encode(moduleTypeId, module, nonce).**0-guardian accounts**: when guardianCount == 0, sigsRequired degrades to 0 and the      owner/EntryPoint can uninstall without any guardian signatures. This is intentional —      a module installed on a 0-guardian account is protected only by the owner key, which is      the same security model as every other operation on such an account. Accounts that require      guardian-gated module removal must configure at least one guardian.

addGuardianWithMixedSigs(address,uint8[].notice: Add an ECDSA guardian with existing guardian consensus.         Requires RECOVERY_THRESHOLD valid guardian signatures.

addP256Guardian(bytes32,bytes32).notice: Add a P-256 (passkey) guardian — owner-only while fewer than RECOVERY_THRESHOLD         guardians exist (pre-consensus bootstrap; a single guardian cannot form a quorum).         Once RECOVERY_THRESHOLD guardians are set, call addP256GuardianWithMixedSigs instead.

addP256GuardianWithMixedSigs(bytes32,byt.notice: Add a P-256 (passkey) guardian with existing guardian consensus.         Requires RECOVERY_THRESHOLD valid guardian signatures so a stolen owner key         cannot expand the guardian set without the current guardians' approval.

approveRecovery().notice: An ECDSA guardian approves the active recovery proposal.

approveRecoveryWithSig(uint8,bytes).notice: P-256 guardian approves an active recovery proposal.

approveWeightChange().notice: Guardian approves the pending weight-change proposal.

approvedAlgorithms(uint8).notice: Algorithm whitelist — SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH (v0.17.2-beta.4).

bindERC8004AgentWallet(address,uint256,a.notice: Bind an execution wallet to an ERC-8004 agent identity NFT.

cancelModuleInstall().notice: Cancel the pending module-install proposal during the timelock window (issue #58 / KI-6).

cancelRecovery().notice: An ECDSA guardian votes to cancel the active recovery. 2-of-3 threshold clears it.

cancelRecoveryWithSig(uint8,bytes).notice: P-256 guardian votes to cancel an active recovery proposal.

cancelWeightChange().notice: Cancel a pending weight-change proposal. Owner or any guardian can cancel.

entryPoint().notice: The ERC-4337 EntryPoint contract (set once in initialize, not immutable for clone compatibility)

executeModuleInstall(bytes).notice: Execute a matured module-install proposal (issue #58 / KI-6).

executeRecovery().notice: Execute recovery after timelock and threshold are met. Permissionless trigger.

executeWeightChange().notice: Execute an approved weight-change after timelock and threshold are met.

getGuardianP256Key(uint8).notice: Get the P-256 public key stored for a guardian slot (returns (0,0) if not a P-256 slot).

guard().notice: Global guard for spending limits (set at construction, cannot be removed)

installModule(uint256,address,bytes).notice: ERC-7579: Install a module. Supports both ECDSA and P-256 guardian multi-sig.

mintAgentIdentity(address,string).notice: Mint an ERC-8004 agent identity NFT to this AirAccount via the official registry.

modifyTierLimitsWithMixedGuardians(uint2.notice: Modify tier limits with mixed-type guardian signatures (ECDSA or P-256).         Required when at least one guardian is a P-256 type.

moduleInstallTimelock().notice: Read the active module-install timelock (seconds). 0 = disabled (immediate installs).

owner().notice: Account owner and ECDSA signer (mutable for social recovery)

parserRegistry().notice: Optional calldata parser registry for DeFi protocol support (address(0) = disabled)

pendingModuleInstall().notice: Read the pending module-install proposal. proposedAt == 0 means none pending.

pendingWeightChange().notice: Pending weight-change proposal (M6.2). proposedAt == 0 means none pending.

proposeModuleInstall(uint256,address,byt.notice: Propose a module install for the timelocked two-step flow (issue #58 / KI-6).

proposeRecovery(address).notice: An ECDSA guardian proposes a recovery. Any guardian may propose; auto-approves self.

proposeRecoveryWithSig(address,uint8,byt.notice: P-256 guardian proposes a recovery (any relayer can submit the pre-signed calldata).

proposeWeightChange((uint8,uint8,uint8,u.notice: Propose a weakening weight-config change (guardian-gated, M6.2).

queryAgentReputation(address,uint256,add.notice: Query aggregated reputation for an agent across a set of clients.

removeGuardianWithMixedSigs(uint8,uint8[.notice: Remove a guardian by index using mixed-type guardian signatures (ECDSA or P-256).         Required when at least one guardian is a P-256 type (which can't use the ECDSA-only path).

setAgentWallet(uint256,address,address,b.notice: Link an agent wallet to this AirAccount by registering it in AgentRegistry.

setModuleInstallTimelock(uint256,bytes).notice: Configure the optional module-install timelock (issue #58 / KI-6).

setWeightConfig((uint8,uint8,uint8,uint8.notice: Set the weight configuration for algId 0x07. First-time: direct owner call.         Subsequent weakening changes require the guardian proposal flow (M6.2).

submitAgentReputation(address,uint256,in.notice: Submit reputation feedback for an agent interaction via the official registry.

tier2Limit().notice: Tier2 max (dual factor); above this requires multi-sig (BLS triple)

tierLimitNonce().notice: Current tier-limit modification nonce.         Increments after each successful modifyTierLimitsWithGuardians /         modifyTierLimitsWithMixedGuardians call. SDK reads this offline         to build the guardian digest before requesting signatures.

uninstallModule(uint256,address,bytes).notice: ERC-7579: Uninstall a module. Supports both ECDSA and P-256 guardian multi-sig.

validator().notice: Optional validator router for external algorithms (BLS, PQ, etc.)

weightConfig().notice: Current weight config. tier1Threshold == 0 means uninitialised → ALG_WEIGHTED fails.
